name: Large Outbound Data Transfer
description: Detects large amounts of data being sent to external destinations
query:
// Large Outbound Transfer Detection
// High volume outbound data transfer
events from ndr_flow
where event_type = "network_connection"
  and direction = "outbound"
  and not destination_ip starts_with "10."
  and not destination_ip starts_with "192.168."
  and not destination_ip starts_with "172."
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having sum(bytes_sent) > 100000000
within 300 seconds
